title: Peace agreement between the United States and Iran to reopen the Strait of Hormuz
summary: The US and Iran will sign a memorandum on June 19 in Switzerland to end hostilities and resume navigation in the strait.
source: Yahoo!ニュース・トピックス

title: Nikkei surpasses 69,000 points for the first time in its history
summary: The Japanese stock index reached an all-time high driven by the announcement of the agreement between the United States and Iran.
source: Yahoo!ニュース・トピックス

title: Japan draws dramatically with the Netherlands in its World Cup debut
summary: The Japanese team came from behind twice to achieve a 2-2 draw in the opening match of Group H.
source: Yahoo!ニュース・トピックス

title: G7 summit in Évian with focus on Ukraine and the Middle East
summary: G7 leaders met in France to coordinate their positions on international conflicts and global security.

title: Switzerland rejects in referendum limiting its population to 10 million inhabitants
summary: Swiss voted against a proposal to restrict immigration, with 55% against.

title: Murder of an elderly man in Osaka leads to arrest of a suspect
summary: A man was arrested for the murder of a resident in an apartment building in the Higashi-Yodogawa district.
source: Yahoo!ニュース・トピックス

title: Tributes and cultural searches: Dazai, Kabuki and the legacy of Oda Shima
summary: In Mitaka, the memory of Osamu Dazai is sought, a kabuki actor performs, and Shakespeare translator Oda Shima passes away.

title: Doctor acquitted in death of 2-year-old child at Tokyo University Hospital
summary: The prosecution did not appeal the acquittal, confirming the judicial decision that exonerated the doctor from responsibility.
source: Yahoo!ニュース・トピックス

title: Trump celebrates his 80th birthday with UFC fights at the White House
summary: The president organized a mixed martial arts event at the official residence to commemorate his birthday.

title: Japanese imperial couple begins official visit to Europe
summary: The emperors of Japan arrived in the Netherlands as part of their tour of several European countries.

title: Trump and Zelensky discuss peace in Ukraine ahead of G7 summit
summary: The Ukrainian president and the US leader held talks on a possible peace agreement in Ukraine.

title: Portable battery fire on a Tōkyū line train causes temporary suspension
summary: A mobile battery caught fire inside a car, fortunately without injuries but interrupting service.

title: Japan to expand victim participation in criminal proceedings
summary: The Ministry of Justice will consult the Legislative Council to reform the law and improve the rights of crime victims.

title: Artificial intelligence faces regulatory and security challenges
summary: From the suspension of an AI system to the threat of hacking, the sector seeks to balance innovation and control.

title: Sweden defeats Tunisia and Australia surprises Turkey in the World Cup
summary: Highlighted results of other World Cup matches with unexpected wins for Sweden and Australia.
source: Yahoo!ニュース・トピックス

title: Japan faces environmental challenges: plastic waste, bears and atmospheric rivers
summary: The country deals with issues such as naphtha shortages, increased bear attacks and more frequent torrential rains.

title: International triumphs: Vekic in tennis, Hamilton in F1 and new shogi champion
summary: Croatian Vekic won the Queen's tournament, Hamilton achieved his first victory with Ferrari and an amateur was crowned in shogi amateur.

title: Conviction for child abuse and accident against a deputy's office
summary: A former teacher was sentenced to 8 years for abusing minors, and a man crashed into the office of legislator Honda Taro.

title: SpaceX: from crazy idea to $2 trillion giant
summary: Elon Musk's company has transformed the space industry and is now one of the most valuable in the world.

title: Earthquake in Philippines raises seabed by up to two meters
summary: A major earthquake in the Philippines altered underwater geography, according to scientific reports.
